---
title: "IGROV-1_sim_ref_guided_eval"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```




```{r}

df = read.csv("known_and_novel_TPR_FDR_F1.tsv", sep="\t", header=T) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Program, Metric, Value)

df$data_name = "IGROV-1_sim"
  

df %>% head()


```


```{r}

df = df %>% filter(Metric != "knownTPR")

df = df %>% spread(key=Metric, value=Value) 

df = df %>% dplyr::rename(Recall = `novelTPR`) %>% mutate(Precision = 1-novelFDR) %>% select(-novelFDR)

df = df %>% gather(key=Metric, value=Value, F1, Recall, Precision)


```



```{r}
# define ranking

prog_ranking = df %>% filter(Metric == "F1") %>% group_by(Program) %>% summarize(mean_F1 = mean(Value)) %>% arrange(desc(mean_F1)) %>% pull(Program)

df$Program = factor(df$Program, levels=prog_ranking)

```

```{r}

df$Metric = factor(df$Metric, levels = c("F1", "Recall", "Precision"))

```


```{r}

df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Program, y=Value, fill=Program)) + geom_col() +
  facet_grid(vars(Metric), vars(data_name)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1)) +
  ggtitle("Ref-reduced benchmarking of Isoform ID on mouse")


```



```{r}


df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Program, y=Value)) + geom_col() +
  facet_grid(vars(Metric), vars(data_name)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1)) +
  ggtitle("Ref-reduced benchmarking of Isoform ID on mouse")


```
